scripts.build: npm -w @liquid-canvas/core run build && npm -w @liquid-canvas/react run build && npm -w @liquid-canvas/vue run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @liquid-canvas/core run typecheck && npm -w @liquid-canvas/react run typecheck && npm -w @liquid-canvas/vue run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm -w @liquid-canvas/core run lint && npm -w @liquid-canvas/react run lint && npm -w @liquid-canvas/vue run lint
scripts.format: npm -w @liquid-canvas/core run format && npm -w @liquid-canvas/react run format && npm -w @liquid-canvas/vue run format
